scope_description: 4-generation Soviet/Ukrainian-Ashkenazi tree where the recorded/social father in GEDCOM is contradicted by autosomal DNA, paternal half-sibling matches, and archive hints. Designed to validate NPE mode, sealed-set assertions, privacy-safe reporting, and DNA-vs-tree conflict resolution.

input_dna_matches.expected_link: paternal Batensky region / Mennonite-adjacent cluster clue
no biological match; social/adoptive family only

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Birth record for Synthetic Proband, mother Tatyana Zhitnitsky. Father field: blank or later amended. Later Soviet documents use Danilov surname.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: does not prove Ivan Danilov as biological father; supports NPE review.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Legal name change/adoption event: child uses Danilov surname after mother's marriage to Ivan Danilov.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: supports social/adoptive father relationship, not biological fatherhood.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Birth of Yuri Batensky, son of Alexander Batensky and Vera Koltunova.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: anchors paternal half-sibling candidate and separates Yuri's maternal Koltunova branch.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Birth of Alexander Batensky, son of Gregory Batensky and Matrona Dodatko.
Ivan Danilov shown as biological father; no DNA or birth certificate citation.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: low-confidence tree claim contradicted by DNA and adoption/name-change records.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: DNA cluster indicates Alexander Batensky as biological father; Ivan Danilov retained as adoptive/social father. Yuri Batensky is paternal half-sibling.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: sealed-set candidate after DNA + archive correlation.

input_user_assertions.assertion: Ivan Danilov is father because GEDCOM/social documents list Danilov surname.
Alexander Batensky is likely biological father based on DNA and archive evidence.
input_user_assertions.evidence: paternal half-sibling + Batensky first-cousin matches + birth records

input_user_assertions.assertion: Yuri Batensky is paternal half-brother, but his Koltunova maternal line should not be imported into proband ancestry.

embedded_errors.reason: GEDCOM/social father conflicts with paternal half-sibling and Batensky cluster DNA
Koltunova line belongs to Yuri's mother, not proband ancestry
public tree biological father assignment lacks sources and conflicts with DNA
social-family match has no shared autosomal DNA
unknown parentage and living relatives require privacy-safe reporting

expected_reasoning_chain: Step 1: Parse GEDCOM and identify Ivan Danilov as recorded/social father in F1.
Step 2: Parse birth/adoption records src_1101 and src_1102; classify Ivan as social/adoptive father candidate rather than biological by default.
Step 3: Evaluate dna_1101: ~1768 cM fits full sibling/half-sibling/aunt/uncle range; shared matches point to Batensky paternal cluster.
Step 4: Evaluate dna_1102: high cM first-cousin-level match triangulates with dna_1101 on Batensky/Dodatko segments.
Step 5: Use src_1103 to confirm Yuri as child of Alexander Batensky and Vera Koltunova; classify Yuri as paternal half-sibling candidate.
Step 6: Use src_1104 to anchor Alexander Batensky to Gregory Batensky and Matrona Dodatko.
Step 7: Separate maternal Zhitnitsky/Levitin matches dna_1104/dna_1105 from paternal Batensky cluster.
Step 8: Confirm DNA contradiction against Ivan Danilov biological father claim; retain Ivan as adoptive/social father based on src_1102.
Step 9: Prevent branch contamination: Vera Koltunova is Yuri's mother but not proband's ancestor.
Step 10: Create sealed-set assertion for biological father Alexander Batensky and social/adoptive father Ivan Danilov with privacy-safe report mode.

relationship_I3_biological_father_of_I1.reason: DNA contradiction + adoption/name-change record; no biological evidence

relationship_I6_ancestor_of_I1.reason: Vera Koltunova is mother of paternal half-sibling, not mother/ancestor of proband

true_lineage: paternal grandparents: I7 Gregory Batensky + I8 Matrona Dodatko
false_claims: Ivan Danilov is biological father because surname is Danilov
Yuri's maternal Koltunova line belongs to proband ancestry
Zero-cM social-family match supports biological Danilov line
Public GEDCOM parent assignment overrides DNA

evaluation_assertions.description: Engine must confirm Alexander Batensky as biological father.
Engine must reject Ivan Danilov as biological father but retain him as adoptive/social father.
Engine must confirm Yuri as paternal half-sibling.

expected.relationship: I5 paternal half sibling of I1

evaluation_assertions.description: Engine must prevent Koltunova branch import into proband ancestry.
Engine must enter NPE privacy-safe mode.
Engine must create sealed-set candidate for biological parentage.

created_for: AutoTreeGen Test Tree Corpus + Evaluation Suite
